title: ArtX
body:
Hey nice to see you here!
ArtX is a mod introduces more blocks mainly for building and decoration to the game to help you build ways you can't in vanilla! Also the mod is survival friendly :D

Update schedule: 2 / month



![New Windows!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba4e821e4dcc669cc0996115afcc0510d9efa854.png)

![Decorate your house with new doors and blocks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78e5daebe8ad2a282241a581225aa598ebe5c975.png)

![Or put new concrete variants and furniture in it!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64a2851d558a6dfa4ed4193f622c9fe36c0f2ce8.png)

![Build custom trees!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dedae8d930b98387ae11279f407f8bf549871f2.png)

![Add detail to your builds!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca02a0c4f9792fe5a5e45d40a3216bd69419fd9d.png)

![Flex on your friends](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ff0bb49588794b68133b3a20e3dacd708486244.png)

![... or hide your base!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f3a55bedaef2e6b2d5a22d353b51c8732781d65.png)


**What you can do:**

- Using the mod in Modpacks
- Showcasing mod (but idk who would even do that XD) and putting the mod in description

**What you can't do:**

- Copying the mod and declearing and/or using as your own
- And other avarage stuff, y'know just don't be a bad person


# Timeline:

### 10th of April, 2025
 - Submitted to Modrinth

### 13rd of April, 2025
 - Accepted and made public

### 23rd of May, 2025
 - 50 download reached

### 26th of July, 2025
 - 100 download reached
